name: chart-radar-grid-circle-fill
visual_summary: A radar chart visualization type, specifically grid-circle-fill, which represents complex data points within a circular grid, often used to display multi-dimensional performance metrics in a dashboard or report.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-radar-grid-circle-fill
Description: A radar chart visualization type, specifically grid-circle-fill, which represents complex data points within a circular grid, often used to display multi-dimensional performance metrics in a dashboard or report.
Style: e.g. light, dark, material
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable, draggable
Tags: chart, radar, grid, dashboard, metrics, data-visualization

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
